title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
